changes.comment: Add observability primitives to the logging packlet: RetainingLogger (bounded most-recent-N ring of structured ILogRecord with min-severity / since-cursor / limit-tail query API), MultiLogger (fans calls out to N child loggers with independent thresholds), and an additive LoggerBase._logStructured hook (default no-op) that exposes the structured (level, formatted, message, parameters) form to subclasses that retain records.
